rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF CHARLES WILLIAM JAMES
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #14, REPORT, FEES
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include the following: 1) Petitioner is not represented by counsel. A substitution of attorney was filed on 1/8/18, and Petitioner states that she chose to proceed in pro per, as she is represented by counsel in the probate estate and she is the sole residue beneficiary under Conservatee's will (after specific cash gifts). 2) It appears that Conservatee executed his will after the establishment of this conservatorship. 3) Petitioner states that her prior attorney has provided $2,185.50 in services, which will be paid out of the probate estate, as the conservatorship estate no longer has funds.
